display.purpose: Page and article titles in the same terminal-paper voice as body text.

body.purpose: Long-form reading at 15px with generous 1.72 line-height and 65ch-75ch measures.

label.purpose: Sparse controls and outline labels, not repeated section grammar.

motion.reducedMotion: Disable outline transitions and avoid content gated by animation.

rules: Articles and daily log entries are not cards.
Blue is reserved for links and core interactive affordances.
Lazy or infinite browsing must keep static fallback pages available.
Avoid visual restyling that makes the archive feel like a SaaS product.
